sectionTitle: Taiwan Really Has Lots of Fun Places

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ hái xiǎng qù qítā dìfang wán.
items.sentenceEnglish: I also want to go have fun in other places.

items.sentenceChinese: 假期我們想去南部旅行。
items.sentencePinyin: Jiàqí wǒmen xiǎng qù nánbù lǚxíng.
items.sentenceEnglish: We want to travel to the south during the vacation.

items.sentencePinyin: Dōngtiān pào wēnquán hěn shūfu.
items.sentenceEnglish: Soaking in hot springs in winter is very comfortable.

items.sentenceChinese: 你建議我們先去墾丁嗎？
items.sentencePinyin: Nǐ jiànyì wǒmen xiān qù Kěndīng ma?
items.sentenceEnglish: Do you suggest we go to Kenting first?

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ xiān qù mǎi huǒchē piào.
items.sentenceEnglish: I will go buy the train tickets first.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ huì kǎolǜ nǐ de jiànyì.
items.sentenceEnglish: I will consider your suggestion.

items.english: without extra effort; on the way; while one is at it
items.sentenceChinese: 你去超市的時候順便買水。
items.sentencePinyin: Nǐ qù chāoshì de shíhou shùnbiàn mǎi shuǐ.
items.sentenceEnglish: Buy some water on the way when you go to the supermarket.

items.sentenceChinese: 那個湖很安靜，也很漂亮。
items.sentencePinyin: Nàge hú hěn ānjìng, yě hěn piàoliang.
items.sentenceEnglish: That lake is quiet and also very beautiful.

items.sentenceChinese: 台灣有很多原住民文化。
items.sentencePinyin: Táiwān yǒu hěn duō yuánzhùmín wénhuà.
items.sentenceEnglish: Taiwan has a lot of indigenous culture.

items.sentenceChinese: 我們這次旅行要坐三趟車。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒmen zhè cì lǚxíng yào zuò sān tàng chē.
items.sentenceEnglish: We need to take three rides on this trip.

items.sentencePinyin: Hòulái wǒmen juédìng qù hǎibiān.
items.sentenceEnglish: Later we decided to go to the beach.

items.sentencePinyin: Qù hǎibiān yào zhùyì ānquán.
items.sentenceEnglish: You should pay attention to safety when going to the beach.

items.sentencePinyin: Kěndīng de shātān hěn yǒumíng.
items.sentenceEnglish: The beaches in Kenting are very famous.

items.sentenceChinese: 我出門前常常檢查錢包。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ chūmén qián chángcháng jiǎnchá qiánbāo.
items.sentenceEnglish: I often check my wallet before going out.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ de qiánbāo tūrán bújiàn le.
items.sentenceEnglish: My wallet suddenly disappeared.

items.sentencePinyin: Tā de jiǎotàchē bèi tōu le.
items.sentenceEnglish: His bicycle was stolen.

items.sentencePinyin: Xiǎotōu tōu le wǒ de shǒujī.
items.sentenceEnglish: A thief stole my cell phone.

items.sentenceChinese: 晚上自己回家不太安全。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǎnshàng zìjǐ huí jiā bú tài ānquán.
items.sentenceEnglish: Going home alone at night is not very safe.

items.sentenceChinese: 這個地方很值得再去一次。
items.sentencePinyin: Zhège dìfang hěn zhídé zài qù yí cì.
items.sentenceEnglish: This place is worth visiting again.

items.english: Kenting, an area on the southern tip of Taiwan, famed for beaches and rain forest
items.sentenceChinese: 很多人假期喜歡去墾丁玩。
items.sentencePinyin: Hěn duō rén jiàqí xǐhuān qù Kěndīng wán.
items.sentenceEnglish: Many people like to go to Kenting during holidays.

items.sentenceChinese: 你可以先休息，又去海邊走走。
items.sentencePinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān xiūxi, yòu qù hǎibiān zǒuzou.
items.sentenceEnglish: You can rest first and then go walk by the beach.

items.english: measure word for number of times
items.sentencePinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng wǒ kàn le liǎng biàn.
items.sentenceEnglish: I watched this movie twice.

items.sentenceChinese: 我們打算住海邊的民宿。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒmen dǎsuàn zhù hǎibiān de mínsù.
items.sentenceEnglish: We plan to stay in a B&B by the sea.

items.sentencePinyin: Jīntiān de yùnqì hěn hǎo.
items.sentenceEnglish: Today’s luck is very good.

items.sentenceChinese: 在南部騎摩托車很方便。
items.sentencePinyin: Zài nánbù qí mótuōchē hěn fāngbiàn.
items.sentenceEnglish: Riding a motorcycle in the south is convenient.

items.sentencePinyin: Kěndīng zài rèdài dìqū.
items.sentenceEnglish: Kenting is in a tropical region.

items.sentencePinyin: Nàlǐ de zhíwù hěn tèbié.
items.sentenceEnglish: The plants there are very special.

items.sentencePinyin: Suǒyǒu de piào dōu mài wán le.
items.sentenceEnglish: All the tickets are sold out.

items.sentencePinyin: Báitiān wǒmen qù hǎibiān wán.
items.sentenceEnglish: We go to the beach in the daytime.

items.sentenceChinese: 他喜歡躺在沙灘上曬太陽。
items.sentencePinyin: Tā xǐhuān tǎng zài shātān shàng shài tàiyáng.
items.sentenceEnglish: He likes to lie on the beach and sunbathe.

items.sentencePinyin: Huánghūn de hǎibiān hěn làngmàn.
items.sentenceEnglish: The seaside at dusk is very romantic.

items.sentenceChinese: 那裡有一條很熱鬧的街。
items.sentencePinyin: Nàlǐ yǒu yì tiáo hěn rènào de jiē.
items.sentenceEnglish: There is a very lively street there.

items.sentenceChinese: 晚上我們去夜市旁邊的街走走。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǎnshàng wǒmen qù yèshì pángbiān de jiē zǒuzou.
items.sentenceEnglish: At night we go walk on the street beside the night market.

items.sentencePinyin: Tā wǎncān xiǎng hē yì bēi píjiǔ.
items.sentenceEnglish: He wants to drink a glass of beer with dinner.

items.english: a particle indicating the coming into contact between two nouns
items.sentencePinyin: Bǎ zhàopiàn fàng zài zhuōzi shàng.
items.sentenceEnglish: Put the photo on the table.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhèlǐ yòu ānjìng yòu shūfu.
items.sentenceEnglish: This place is both quiet and comfortable.

items.sentencePinyin: Kàn hǎi zhēnde hěn làngmàn.
items.sentenceEnglish: Watching the sea is really romantic.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ chángcháng xiǎngniàn wǒ de jiāxiāng.
items.sentenceEnglish: I often miss my hometown.

items.sentenceChinese: 假期有很多觀光客去墾丁。
items.sentencePinyin: Jiàqí yǒu hěn duō guāngguāngkè qù Kěndīng.
items.sentenceEnglish: Many tourists go to Kenting during holidays.

items.sentenceChinese: 他喜歡在沙灘上曬太陽。
items.sentencePinyin: Tā xǐhuān zài shātān shàng shài tàiyáng.
items.sentenceEnglish: He likes to sunbathe on the beach.

items.sentenceChinese: 年輕人很喜歡玩水上摩托車。
items.sentencePinyin: Niánqīngrén hěn xǐhuān wán shuǐshàng mótuōchē.
items.sentenceEnglish: Young people really like riding jet skis.

items.sentenceChinese: 很多人去了以後就愛上那裡。
items.sentencePinyin: Hěn duō rén qù le yǐhòu jiù àishàng nàlǐ.
items.sentenceEnglish: Many people fall in love with that place after going there.
